title: Skeletons Rising
description: Adds Various skeleton types with unique loot and new weapons!
body:
Skeleton Rising is a mod who add new skeletons to minecraft. Most of skeletons spawns in their  biome/biomes


 
UNDEAD ARMY
Its an event which u can trigger by using Totem of Undeads you can craft it using 2 netherite scraps, 2 deepslate, 3 bone blocks and 2 diamonds, if you use it you'll have to fight with under warrior and their leader, if you succeed, then you get a soulsteel scraps whic u can use to craft soulsteel

SOUL STEEL
it's a material used to craft new bows, armor, and archery workbench,
Soulhunter Armor has setbonus which makes it better in the nether

SKELETON MERCHANT
Skeleton Merchant is a skeleton which sell gold or golden apple for bones.
He spawns in his tent. If you kill him Skeleton merchant will turn into tainted merchant.
he sells new bones and bone sword fragment. he is a mini boss and from him you can get a new sword

SKELETON PRIME
Skeleton Prime is a mini-boss to summon him you need a mechanical totem , to craft it you need
2 soul steel scraps 2 netherite scraps 2 redstone block  2 bone blocks and iron block
With him drops 1-4 prime scraps of which you can craft Prime Saw Blade (Soon there will be other craftings)

ARCHERY WORKSHOP
it's used in creating new bows, to craft it you need 7 obsidian 1 soulsteel ingot and 1 fletching table, new bows require soulsteel templare (crafted by 1 soulsteel ingot and bow) unique bones (for example honey bones, basalt bones, etc.) and special material from skeleton, if you have all of them you can create bow! 

SKELETONS 

 

SKELETONS OVERWORLD:  

-Rotten Beekeeper 

-Frozen Great Stray 

-Thermital Socket 

-Moss Skeleton 

-Barrel Skeleton

-Desert Skeleton

-Fungus Skeleton 

-Swamp Skeleton

-Phantom Skeleton

-Amethyst Skeleton

-Coral Skeleton

SKELETONS NETHER: 

-Hell Skeleton 

-Eruption 

-Crimson Skeleton

-Warped Skeleton

-Soul Terror

-Necromancer

SKELETONS END:

-Chorus Skeleton 

SPECIAL SKELETONS:

-Undead Warrior 

-Leader of Undead Army

-Tainted Merchant

-Skeleton Merchant

-Skeleton Prime

-Alchemist Skeleton
THANKS FOR PLAYING MY MOD :3
